UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, CROSS DEFENDANT PAUL TRADELIUS' DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 11, 2014. MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND OPPOSING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PER SFLR 2.6B AND C TO DEPARTMENT 501 NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 18, 2014 WITH COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, CROSS DEFENDANT PAUL TRADELIUS' DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION. COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES FACTS RE: CC 1950.5(F)(3). DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT TO ALLEGE FACTS RE: USE OF FORCE, WILLFUL THREATS, OR MENACING CONDUCT. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT TO ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING THAT CROSS-COMPLAINT WAS LOCKED OUT FROM THE PREMISES. DEMURER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION TO ALLEGE FACTS RE: FRAUD, INTIMIDATION OR COERCION. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION. COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES FACTS RE: ENDEAVOR TO RECOVER POSSESSION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE LILIAN K. SING, CLERK B. PAREDES, NOT REPORTED. (501

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Vacated

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-01-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT PAUL TRADELIUS' MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is denied. Moving party failed to provide courtesy copies as required by Local Rule 2.6B and the court's order issued on June 2, 2014. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Continued To Oct-06-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Continued To Jul-01-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
CROSS-DEFENDANT PAUL TRADELIUS' MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to July 1, 2014. All parties are ordered to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and immediately provide a courtesy copy of their filings. Please attach a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2014 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances: The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT PAUL TRADELIUS' DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to the 1st cause of action. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts re: CC 1950.5(f)(3). Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 2nd cause of action for cross-complainant to allege facts re: use of force, willful threats, or menacing conduct. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 3rd cause of action for cross-complainant to allege facts showing that cross-complaint was locked out from the premises. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 4th causes of action to allege facts re: fraud, intimidation or coercion. Demurrer is overruled as to the 5th cause of action. complaint sufficiently alleges facts re: endeavor to recover possession. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Lilian K. Sing, Clerk B. Paredes, Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Continued To Mar-11-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:CROSS DEFENDANT PAUL TRADELIUS' DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is Continued to March 11, 2014. Moving party shall provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and opposing party shall provide courtesy copies of the opposition per SFLR 2.6B and C to department 501 no later than February 18, 2014 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2014 Continued To Feb-10-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANT PAUL TRADELIUS' DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS Transferred to Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court, to be heard on February 8, 2014, at 9:30 am. See San Francisco Local Rule 8.10. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT PAUL TRADELIUS' DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS Off calendar as untimely pursuant to CCP 1005(b) ("all moving and supporting papers shall be served and filed at least 16 court days before the hearing"). The demurrer was filed on November 8, 2013, which is untimely. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
